title: Automated BIM
shortDescription: Automated model validation, covering data completeness, clash detection, and standardised information handover, redefining BIM project delivery. Project quality demands are accelerating the shift.
longDescription: Our "BIM model checking service" delivers structured quality assurance through an automated workflow, from the IFC-based data exchange and LOI validation through to the clash-free, compliant construction documentation. We integrate model checking tools such as Solibri to verify data completeness, discipline coordination, and information handover across all project stages, significantly enhancing time efficiency. A real-time project status dashboard keeps all stakeholders informed, requiring no BIM expertise to navigate. Our approach ensures that quality standards, regulatory compliance, and data integrity are embedded in the model from the beginning, not patched in at handover.
